rawContent: {"stage":"review-fix","insights":[{"kind":"gotcha","text":"409 duplicate-detection logic that relies on a DB unique constraint is fragile — if the constraint doesn't exist in the schema, concurrent submissions silently create duplicates. Always verify the con","scope":"src/app/api/assignments/[id]/submit/route.ts"},{"kind":"lesson","text":"studentId must come from the authenticated user context (user.id), never from the request body, to prevent auth bypass.","scope":"auth"},{"kind":"convention","text":"This codebase uses getPayload({ config: configPromise }) and withAuth middleware for API routes, not direct payload access.","scope":"src/app/api"},{"kind":"convention","text":"Success responses follow { success, data } shape; errors follow { success: false, error } — matching the quiz submit pattern.","scope":"API responses"}]}
